title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Dance Workshop
questions.text: Try street dance with professional teachers this Friday. No special clothes are needed, but trainers are safer than school shoes. Parents may watch the final fifteen minutes of the workshop.
questions.question: What does the advert advise students?

options.B: Wear suitable shoes for the activity.
options.A: Bring special clothes for the performance.
options.C: Ask parents to stay for the whole workshop.

questions.explanation: The advert says trainers are safer than school shoes.

questions.heading: Message from Eva to Dan
questions.text: Dan, the restaurant I booked has just called. Their upstairs room is closed, but they can give us a table downstairs. It’ll be noisier, so tell me if you’d rather go somewhere else. Eva
questions.question: Why is Eva texting Dan?

options.C: To check whether he accepts a change.
options.A: To ask him to book another restaurant.
options.B: To say the restaurant has cancelled everything.

questions.explanation: Eva explains the change and asks if Dan would prefer another place.

questions.heading: Library Computers
questions.text: Because exam week starts on Monday, library computers can only be booked for revision or coursework. Students wishing to print photos or watch videos should use the media room instead.
questions.question: What does the notice mean?

options.A: Some computer activities must be done elsewhere.
options.B: The library computers are closed during exam week.
options.C: Students cannot print anything at school now.

questions.explanation: Printing photos or watching videos should happen in the media room.

questions.heading: From: Uncle Mark / Subject: Bike
questions.text: I found a second-hand bike that might suit you. It needs a new light, but the tyres are good and it’s the right size. I can collect it tomorrow if you want me to.
questions.question: What is Uncle Mark doing?

options.B: Offering to get a bike he has seen.
options.A: Explaining how to repair the bike’s tyres.
options.C: Asking to borrow a bike tomorrow.

questions.explanation: He has found a bike and offers to collect it.

questions.heading: School Garden Club
questions.text: Garden club members should meet by the greenhouse today, not the main gate. We will be planting vegetables, so bring old shoes. If you joined last week, your membership card is ready.
questions.question: What information is given to garden club members?

options.C: They should go to a different meeting point.
options.A: They must collect vegetables from the greenhouse.
options.B: They need a card before joining the club.

questions.explanation: Members should meet by the greenhouse instead of the main gate.
